title: In form France meet giant killers Paraguay in World Cup last-16 clash
fetched: raw-HTML 直抓 + 抽取(html:paragraphs) + 清洗（逐字、未经任何模型/改写/翻译）
original_text:
France have been the best team so far at the World Cup, although Paraguay are in a confident mood after upsetting Germany.

How can your team reach the final and win the World Cup 2026? Click here to find out – or click here to join our live coverage of France against Paraguay.

Who: France vs Paraguay
What: FIFA World Cup 2026 – Round of 16
Where: Philadelphia Stadium, US
When: Saturday, July 4, at 5pm (21:00 GMT)
How to follow: We will have all the build-up on
